title: thymus pallasianus subsp. ciliatissimus
intro: Thymus pallasianus subsp. ciliatissimus, also known as the Alpine thyme, is a subspecies of the Thymus pallasianus plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family. This herb is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Thymus pallasianus subsp. ciliatissimus include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
